_README: Add your API key(s) below. QUORUM auto-detects what you have and routes each agent to the best model available. You only need ONE key to get started.

api_keys._note: Paste key(s) here OR set as environment variables. Env vars take priority.

model_preferences._note: Optional. Override the model QUORUM uses per provider per quality tier. Remove this whole section to use defaults.

fallback_strategy._note: QUORUM automatically tries all your available providers on error. No configuration needed here.
fallback_strategy.on_hard_stop_message:
No API keys found.
Add at least one key to quorum.config.json or set it as an environment variable.

Free options:
  Google Gemini (free tier): https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey  → GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY
  Groq (free):               https://console.groq.com                 → GROQ_API_KEY

Paid:
  Anthropic Claude:          https://console.anthropic.com            → ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
  OpenAI GPT:                https://platform.openai.com              → OPENAI_API_KEY
